title: Fix personas tab terminology and modal schema

log.context: Fix personas tab terminology and modal schema

Both commits are pushed. Here's a summary of everything changed:

---

## Changes Made

### `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html` (committed to `bigclungus/clung.us`, pushed)

**1. Status dropdown in modal** — Options changed from `active` / `fired (severance)` to `eligible` / `ineligible (retired)`. These are now the canonical values the form submits.

**2. Status badge display** — The table status pill now shows human-readable labels: `eligible` stays "eligible", `ineligible` shows **"retired"...(truncated)
